data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of the 'Appeal/retake scheduling' feature. While the linked use case mentions that a candidate can appeal and schedule a retake, there are no specific details or endpoints provided that demonstrate how this functionality is implemented or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage for this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or validation of appeal/retake scheduling.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the appeal/retake scheduling requirement.
